title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 30: Discourse on Swords
description: Chapter 30 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 30 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: In ancient times, King Wen of Zhao loved swords. Expert swordsmen flocked to his gate, and over three thousand of them were supported as guests in his household. Day and night they fell to it before him until the dead and wounded numbered more than a hundred men a year.
